title: O Dimos apo ta Trikala
actors: Kostas Hatzihristos, Kyveli Theohari, Ketty Panou
plot: Claiming that he and his brother, Dimos, are like two peas in a pod, a womanising husband puts the blame on him when his wife discovers a compromising photograph. Now, he has a lot of explaining to do. Is he or Dimos the man in th...
